checks.finding: All AC-NNN referenced in task Done When/Scope resolve to real criteria in acceptance-tests.md (AC-001..AC-019): T-002{AC-010,AC-011}, T-003{AC-008,AC-009}, T-004{AC-012}, T-005{AC-001,AC-002}, T-012{AC-003,AC-005}, T-013{AC-004}, T-006{AC-006,AC-007}, T-007{AC-013}, T-008{AC-014,AC-015}, T-009{AC-016,AC-017}, T-010{AC-018}, T-011{AC-019}. All 13 tasks have a Blockers field that is either 'None' (T-001) or a comma-separated list of valid T-\d{3} IDs (e.g. T-011: 'T-001, T-002, ... T-013'). No range notation or prose. blockers_format_valid=true, consistent with precheck-result.json blockers_format_valid:true.

All REQ-001..REQ-013 appear in at least one task Requirements field: REQ-001{T-001,T-002,T-006}, REQ-002{T-005,T-012,T-013}, REQ-003{T-002,T-006}, REQ-004{T-001,T-007}, REQ-005{T-003}, REQ-006{T-002}, REQ-007{T-004}, REQ-008{T-013}, REQ-009{T-008}, REQ-010{T-009}, REQ-011{T-010}, REQ-012{T-011}, REQ-013{T-001}. No uncovered requirement.
All AC-001..AC-019 are traceable to a task via Done When AC references and traceability.md AC->TEST->Task table. Each AC maps to exactly one owning task. No uncovered AC.
Every one of the 13 tasks references at least one REQ-NNN in its Requirements field. No orphan task.

Test/verification-scoped tasks reference ACs: T-006 (read-only 静的検査 + no-write テスト, tests-only scope) -> AC-006/AC-007; T-007 (契約 schema + ajv 検証) -> AC-013. Tool tasks with test scope (T-005/T-012/T-013) each reference their target ACs. No test task lacks an AC reference.
Attempt 2, round 1: all 13 tasks have Approval: Draft (not Approved) and Status: Planned, satisfying the subsequent-round constraint (Approval != Approved; Status in {Planned,In Progress,Blocked}).

All Risk/Required Workflow pairs match the risk-gate matrix: medium->acceptance-first (T-001,T-008); low->test-after (T-011); high->tdd (T-002,T-003,T-004,T-005,T-012,T-013,T-006,T-007,T-009,T-010). Consistent with precheck workflow_match_precheck:PASS.

No AC-NNN is claimed as primary target by more than one task. Tools split across T-005 (AC-001,002), T-012 (AC-003,005), T-013 (AC-004) each own distinct ACs despite sharing tools/actions.ts. No duplicate AC ownership.

All Blockers references resolve to existing task IDs present in dependency-graph.json nodes (T-001,T-002,T-003,T-004,T-005,T-012,T-013,T-006,T-007,T-008,T-009,T-010,T-011). No reference to a non-existent task.

BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS so cycle detection ran. Graph edges form a DAG with valid topological order T-001 -> {T-002,T-004} -> T-003 -> T-005 -> T-012 -> T-013 -> {T-006,T-007} -> T-008 -> T-009 -> T-010 -> T-011. Serial chain T-005->T-012->T-013 over shared actions.ts/server.ts introduces no back-edge; no cycle.

Each task addresses one coherent concern; 'and'/'+' clauses are either tightly-coupled implementation pairs (T-002 client+error-normalizer, T-007 schema+ajv validation) or mandatory housekeeping (T-011 docs + traceability finalization). The prior attempt-1 SCOPE-DISJOINT defect (T-005/T-012/T-013 siblings mutating shared tools/actions.ts and server.ts with no ordering) is resolved: tasks.md now serializes them via Blockers chain T-012:{...,T-005}, T-013:{...,T-012}, and both consumers T-006/T-007 depend on all three, so no two shared-file tasks are concurrently eligible. Each of T-005/T-012/T-013 is individually single-concern (run tools / jobs+artifacts tools / job-log+truncation).

Every Done When item is observable (AC-bound assertions, unit/contract test results, Red->Green evidence, provenance evidence bundle, named implementation report artifacts, quality gate pass). No forbidden verbs (ensure/consider/works correctly/verify is correct). Each non-doc task names a concrete verification (typecheck/tests green, static grep, ajv, dist-parity CI, Inspector smoke) and evidence artifact; doc-only T-011 names exact files (README.md/USERGUIDE.md) plus addendum reports/implementation/ci-mcp/T-011.md.

All 13 task IDs (T-001..T-013) appear in traceability.md Task->REQ table; all REQ IDs cited (REQ-001..REQ-013) exist in requirements.md; all AC IDs exist in acceptance-tests.md. Full-profile: every REQ row has canonical <layer>-spec.md#<section> anchors or reasoned 'N/A — cross-layer only:' rationale; cited anchors verified present in hash-bound docs (security-spec.md: Trust Boundaries/STRIDE Analysis/Secrets Management/Data Classification and Protection/SBOM and Supply Chain; infra-spec.md: Deployment Topology). No dangling references.
